name: BKLYN SWING
about: BKLYN SWING is a community-driven indoor golf facility located in Dyker Heights, Brooklyn, NYC. They feature four state-of-the-art TrackMan simulator suites, offering professional-quality simulator technology and expert PGA instruction for golfers of all levels. The venue is situated one mile from Dyker Beach Park and Golf Course, providing a convenient urban golf experience. Bay rentals are priced at $40/hour during off-peak times (weekdays before 4pm) and $60/hour during peak times (after 4pm and all day weekends). Each bay can accommodate up to four players.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional TrackMan technology providing 40+ data points per swing
Convenient urban location near Dyker Beach Park
Variety of game modes including challenges and practice modes
Availability of expert PGA instruction for all skill levels
Welcoming environment for both golfers and non-golfers

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service available on-site.
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB policy is not specified.

simulator_hardware.notes: Four simulator suites available; advanced radar technology for precise tracking.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While the website does not explicitly state they provide clubs, it is standard practice at such facilities to offer rental clubs or expect players to bring their own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a policy on bringing outside food or drinks, but it also does not mention an on-site kitchen or bar, suggesting a BYOB policy may be in place.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes on a simulator typically takes between 2 to 3 hours, depending on the number of players and pace of play, though the website does not provide a specific time estimate.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is kid-friendly, offering junior clinics, family-friendly game modes, and the ability to accommodate groups with children in the simulator bays.
